customer_situation: Customer received a bank referral and wants family protection options.

must_do: Avoid promising approval or exact premium
must_not_do: Push a specific plan without needs check
Ask for sensitive personal numbers in chat

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Hi po, may bank referral ako. Interested ako sa coverage for my family. Ano options?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Sige po, thank you for sharing. For family protection, usually tinitingnan muna kung sino ang gusto ninyong protektahan, magkano ang target coverage, at kung monthly or annual premium ang comfortable. Para ma-guide ko kayo, coverage ba ito mainly for income protection, education fund, or loan protection?
conversation.why: Starts with needs-based selling instead of product pushing.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Mostly income protection po. May wife and two kids ako.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Gets ko po. For income protection, importante malaman ang approximate monthly income, existing insurance if any, at budget range. Hindi ko po kailangan ng exact private details dito. Range lang muna, like below 2k, 2k to 5k, or above 5k pesos monthly premium, okay na for initial recommendation.
conversation.why: Collects enough data while protecting privacy.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Siguro 3k monthly budget. Wala pa akong existing insurance.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Noted po, 3k monthly and no existing insurance. Good starting point po yan for basic family protection, pero final options depend on age, health declaration, and insurer underwriting. I can summarize the likely plan types and then connect you to a licensed advisor for the official quotation.
conversation.why: Gives useful direction while keeping quote and underwriting boundaries clear.

customer_situation: Customer wants to add a beneficiary to an existing life policy.

Avoid collecting full beneficiary identity in chat

conversation.why: Keeps the bot from handling sensitive account servicing directly.

conversation.speaker: customer

conversation.text: Mas mabuti pong huwag ibigay dito ang full personal details. Para safe, gamitin natin ang official servicing form or advisor-assisted process. Usually hihingin doon ang relationship, complete name, birth date, and supporting details, pero sa verified channel po dapat ilagay.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Sa maraming policy servicing requests, maaaring walang fee, pero policy-specific po ito at depende sa insurer rules. I-check po natin sa official servicing team para hindi tayo magbigay ng maling commitment. Gusto ninyo po bang i-route ko kayo sa servicing request path?

customer_situation: Customer is comparing term life and investment-linked insurance.

must_do: Flag that investment values are not guaranteed
must_not_do: Give personalized financial advice without qualification

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ano po mas okay, term insurance or may investment na insurance?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Depende po sa goal. Term insurance is usually focused on protection for a fixed period. Insurance with investment component can combine protection and fund value, pero hindi guaranteed ang market-linked performance. Ang unang tanong po: priority ninyo ba ay maximum coverage at lower premium, or protection plus long-term savings discipline?
conversation.why: Frames the decision around needs and avoids product bias.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Gusto ko sana protection pero may makukuha din in future.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Gets po. Kung gusto ninyo ng future value, kailangan nating pag-usapan ang budget, risk tolerance, at kung gaano katagal ninyo kayang ituloy ang premium. Important din po malaman na early withdrawal or missed payments may affect benefits. Ano pong monthly budget range ninyo?
conversation.why: Adds practical warnings that matter for investment-linked products.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Mga 4k monthly, pero ayoko ng risky masyado.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Noted po: 4k monthly and conservative risk profile. I can mark you as interested in protection with possible savings value, but a licensed advisor should show exact benefit illustrations, charges, and risks before you decide. Hindi po ako magpo-promise ng future fund value.
conversation.why: Shows adaptation to customer preference and compliance boundary.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Bisa top up loan kalau outstanding masih ada?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Bisa saja ada opsi top up, tapi tergantung sisa outstanding, riwayat bayar, penghasilan, dan kebijakan penyedia. Top up biasanya berarti limit baru dihitung setelah melihat pinjaman berjalan. Selama ini pembayaran cicilan lancar atau pernah telat?
conversation.why: Uses terms customer used and checks risk.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Pernah telat sekali, tapi sudah lunas bulan itu.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, pernah telat sekali dan sudah dibayar. Itu bisa tetap menjadi bagian dari penilaian, tapi bukan berarti otomatis ditolak. Nanti sistem akan melihat pola pembayaran keseluruhan dan kemampuan bayar saat ini.
conversation.why: Balanced response: neither reject nor promise.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau settlement lebih cepat ada diskon?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Pelunasan lebih cepat atau settlement bisa punya ketentuan biaya, rebate, atau diskon tertentu, tetapi harus dihitung resmi oleh penyedia. Saya tidak akan menebak angkanya. Sebaiknya minta settlement quotation resmi sebelum bayar.

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and asks if insurance is worth it.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Bhai, worth it ba talaga insurance? Parang gastos lang monthly eh.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Gets kita. Mukha talaga siyang gastos kapag walang nangyayari. Pero ang point ng life insurance is protection: kung may dependents or utang, may safety net sila if something happens. May family ba na naka-depend sa income mo?
conversation.why: Natural colloquial response without becoming careless.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: May baby kami, tapos may housing loan pa.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Then mas may sense pag-usapan. Hindi ibig sabihin kailangan mahal agad. We can size coverage around income replacement, baby expenses, and housing loan balance, then keep premium sustainable.
conversation.why: Links insurance to the customer's real obligations.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ayoko lang mabudol ng plan na di ko kaya.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Fair concern. Ang tamang plan dapat kaya mong ituloy, malinaw ang charges, and explained ang exclusions. If hindi clear, huwag muna mag-sign. I can help list questions before you speak with the advisor.

customer_situation: Customer casually asks if they can cancel anytime.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Pwede naman i-cancel anytime di ba? Try ko lang muna.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Pwede kang mag-request to cancel or surrender, pero hindi siya parang simple subscription lang. May possible charges, lower surrender value, or loss of coverage, especially early years. Better check the policy terms before starting.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ah so lugi pag maaga kinancel?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Possible, yes. Many policies are designed for long-term protection, so early cancellation can reduce value. Kaya importanteng pumili ng premium na kaya mong bayaran consistently.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Then start small na lang siguro.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Good approach iyon. Start with protection that fits your budget, then review kapag mas stable ang income. I can help define a basic coverage target before you talk to the advisor.
conversation.why: Turns objection into sensible next step.

customer_situation: Customer speaks informal Filipino about affordability.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Parang di ko kakayanin buwan-buwan. Baka maputol lang.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Tama po na isipin iyan bago kumuha. Mas mabuti ang mas maliit pero tuloy-tuloy kaysa malaking premium na mapuputol agad. Magkano po ang comfortable na monthly amount na hindi makakaapekto sa essentials ninyo?

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Mga 1k lang siguro.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Okay po, 1k monthly. Sa ganyang budget, protection-first option ang dapat unahin, hindi muna complicated na add-ons. Final coverage will depend on age and underwriting, pero pwede itong gawing starting point.
conversation.why: Does not dismiss a low budget.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Pwede pa rin ba may beneficiary?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Usually yes, beneficiary is a standard part of life insurance setup. Details and rules depend on the policy, and beneficiary information should be provided through the official application or servicing channel.
conversation.why: Answers simple feature while protecting personal data.

customer_situation: Customer asks casually if taking a loan is risky.

must_do: Explain risk depends on ability to pay
Warn against borrowing for unclear need

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Bang, ambil pinjaman tuh aman gak sih? Takut kejebak cicilan.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Aman atau tidaknya tergantung tujuan pinjaman dan kemampuan bayar. Kalau cicilan masih masuk akal dan kebutuhannya jelas, bisa membantu. Kalau dipakai untuk kebutuhan konsumtif tanpa rencana bayar, risikonya tinggi. Pinjamannya untuk apa?
conversation.why: Natural local tone with responsible lending.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Buat nutup kebutuhan rumah dulu, nanti gaji masuk.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Oke, berarti kebutuhan jangka pendek. Kita perlu pastikan jumlahnya tidak lebih besar dari kemampuan bayar saat gaji masuk. Ada cicilan lain yang sedang berjalan?

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ada cicilan motor 900 ribu.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Berarti cicilan baru harus dihitung bareng cicilan motor 900 ribu. Jangan sampai total cicilan mengganggu biaya pokok. Saya bisa bantu buat simulasi kasar, tapi angka resmi tetap dari penyedia.

customer_situation: Customer complains about admin fees in casual style.

must_do: Explain fees must be disclosed officially

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kok banyak biaya admin ya? Jadi males ngajuin.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Paham, biaya tambahan memang harus jelas dari awal. Sebelum lanjut, cek simulasi resmi: pokok pinjaman, bunga atau margin, biaya admin, biaya provisi kalau ada, asuransi kalau ada, dan total yang dibayar. Kalau tidak jelas, sebaiknya tanya dulu sebelum setuju.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau biaya admin dipotong dari pencairan, berarti uang diterima kurang?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Bisa begitu, tergantung produk. Ada biaya yang dibayar di awal, ada yang dipotong dari pencairan, ada yang masuk cicilan. Jadi yang perlu dilihat adalah dana diterima bersih dan total kewajiban bayar.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Oke, berarti harus minta rincian dulu.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Betul. Minta rincian tertulis atau simulasi resmi sebelum menyetujui. Simpan dokumennya, dan jangan lanjut kalau ada biaya yang tidak dijelaskan dengan jelas.

customer_situation: Customer is angry about a claim delay and asks for a human.

must_not_do: Ask for full policy number in open chat

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ang tagal ng claim namin. Paulit-ulit na requirements. Tao na lang kausapin ko.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: I understand po, nakaka-frustrate talaga kapag claim-related and urgent. I can route this to a human claims or servicing representative. Before that, short summary lang po: claim type, approximate date submitted, and what requirement was repeated. No need to send full policy number here.
conversation.why: Honors escalation and protects sensitive data.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Death claim, submitted last month, hinihingi ulit death certificate.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Salamat po. I will summarize it as death claim submitted last month with repeated death certificate request. I cannot confirm approval or denial here, but the claims team can check the file status and reason for the repeat request.
conversation.why: Gives a clean handoff without adjudicating.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Please make it urgent.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: I will mark the request as urgent due to claim delay and repeated requirement. I cannot guarantee the queue outcome, but I will keep the escalation summary clear so the human team can review faster.

customer_situation: Customer wants detailed premium quote and official advice.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Pwede mo na ba akong bigyan ng exact quotation?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Para sa exact quotation, kailangan po itong manggaling sa official quotation tool or licensed advisor, dahil depende sa age, health, coverage, riders, and underwriting. Maaari ko pong ihanda ang summary ng needs ninyo para mas mabilis ang discussion.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Sige, ano ang summary ko?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Summary po: interested in life insurance for family protection, wants sustainable premium, needs coverage for dependents, and wants to understand riders and exclusions before deciding. Wala pa po tayong official quote until advisor review.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Connect me then.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Sige po. I will route this to a licensed advisor and include the summary. Please provide personal details only through the official secure channel when the advisor or bank process asks for them.
conversation.why: Moves to human without collecting PII in bot.

customer_situation: Customer disputes a late fee and wants human support.

must_do: Ask for safe summary not sensitive details

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Denda saya salah. Saya mau bicara dengan petugas, bukan bot.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, saya pahami Bapak/Ibu ingin diperiksa oleh petugas. Saya bisa eskalasikan ke tim layanan atau billing. Untuk ringkasan aman, mohon sebutkan jenis pinjaman, tanggal bayar perkiraan, dan alasan mengapa denda dianggap tidak sesuai. Jangan kirim OTP atau password.
conversation.why: Accepts escalation and gathers useful non-sensitive context.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya bayar sebelum jam 10 malam, tapi besoknya masih kena denda.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, saya catat: pembayaran dilakukan sebelum jam 10 malam, tetapi denda tetap muncul keesokan hari. Tim billing perlu cek cut-off pembayaran, waktu posting, dan status transaksi. Saya tidak bisa menghapus denda langsung dari sini.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Tolong dipercepat.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya akan tandai sebagai permintaan prioritas karena ada sengketa denda. Hasil pengecekan tetap mengikuti antrean dan data transaksi resmi, tetapi ringkasan kasus akan saya buat jelas.

customer_situation: Customer asks for restructuring due to hardship.

conversation.speaker: customer

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya paham ini situasi berat. Restrukturisasi atau keringanan harus ditinjau oleh tim resmi berdasarkan kondisi akun, riwayat pembayaran, dan dokumen pendukung. Saya bisa bantu buat permintaan eskalasi, tetapi tidak bisa menyetujui dari chat ini.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected

conversation.why: Important payment boundary in hardship flow.

customer_situation: Customer reports suspected fraud call.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected

conversation.speaker: bot_expected

customer_situation: Sundanese-influenced customer asks about loan eligibility with informal words.

conversation.speaker: customer

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Untuk freelance, biasanya lebih aman memakai rata-rata pemasukan beberapa bulan dan mutasi rekening sebagai bukti. Kita juga perlu pilih cicilan yang tidak terlalu dekat dengan batas kemampuan bayar.

conversation.speaker: customer

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Tidak selalu pasti ditolak, tetapi dokumen kurang bisa membuat proses tertunda atau perlu tambahan bukti. Tim verifikasi akan menentukan dokumen resmi yang dibutuhkan sesuai produk.

customer_situation: Betawi-influenced customer asks about admin fees and installment.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected

customer_situation: Eastern Indonesia-influenced customer asks if late payment can wait until harvest/sales.

conversation.why: Records intent but keeps boundary clear.

customer_situation: Minang-influenced customer asks about business loan documents and repayment.

conversation.speaker: customer

conversation.speaker: bot_expected

conversation.why: Connects repayment risk to business cash flow.

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to guarantee claim approval.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Can you guarantee na babayaran ang family ko if something happens?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: I cannot guarantee a future claim outcome po. Claims depend on policy being active, truthful disclosures, covered event, exclusions, and submitted requirements. What I can do is help you understand the claim conditions before you choose a plan.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Then paano ako magkakatiwala?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Fair question po. Trust should come from clear policy documents, official benefit illustration, licensed advisor explanation, and knowing the exclusions before signing. If any part is unclear, ask for clarification first before paying.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Okay, send me exclusions checklist.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Ask about suicide clause, pre-existing condition rules, contestability period, hazardous activities, country or occupation restrictions, rider exclusions, and claim document requirements. The official policy wording is still the final source.

customer_situation: Customer asks for legal advice on naming beneficiary outside family.

must_do: Suggest advisor/legal professional for complex cases

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Can I name my partner as beneficiary even if we are not married? Is that legally safe?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: You may be able to nominate a beneficiary depending on the policy rules, but I cannot give legal advice on whether it is legally safe for your situation. For complex family or estate questions, speak with a licensed advisor and, if needed, a legal professional.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: I just do not want disputes later.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: That is understandable. To reduce confusion, ask the advisor about beneficiary designation rules, required documents, revocable or irrevocable beneficiary implications, and how updates are processed. Do not share full personal details here.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: So final answer should come from advisor?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Yes. I can explain general concepts, but the official guidance should come from the insurer or licensed advisor, and legal questions should be checked with a qualified legal professional.

customer_situation: Customer asks whether to hide smoking status.

customer_situation: Customer asks whether paying tomorrow avoids late status.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Jatuh tempo hari ini, tapi saya baru bisa bayar besok pagi. Masih aman?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya paham. Status keterlambatan tergantung tanggal jatuh tempo, waktu pembayaran diterima, dan cut-off posting. Saya tidak bisa menjamin aman jika dibayar setelah jatuh tempo. Sebaiknya gunakan kanal resmi secepat mungkin dan simpan bukti bayar.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau transfer malam ini tapi masuk besok?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Yang biasanya dilihat adalah waktu pembayaran terposting di sistem, bukan hanya niat transfer. Karena tiap kanal punya cut-off berbeda, pilih kanal yang paling cepat terposting dan cek instruksi resmi.
conversation.why: Explains a common payment edge case.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Baik, saya akan bayar via virtual account.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik. Pastikan virtual account berasal dari kanal resmi, cek nama penyedia, nominal, dan simpan bukti transaksi. Jangan transfer ke rekening pribadi atau membagikan OTP.
conversation.why: Combines payment help with fraud safety.

customer_situation: Customer can only pay after selling stock.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Stok belum laku, jadi cicilan baru bisa saya bayar akhir minggu.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya paham, arus kas usaha kadang belum masuk sesuai rencana. Tapi cicilan tetap mengikuti tanggal jatuh tempo di kontrak. Kalau lewat, denda atau status telat bisa berlaku. Lebih baik hubungi layanan resmi sebelum telat terlalu jauh.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya pelanggan lama, masa tidak bisa dikasih toleransi?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Riwayat sebagai pelanggan lama bisa menjadi konteks saat tim resmi meninjau, tetapi saya tidak bisa menjanjikan toleransi atau penghapusan denda. Saya bisa bantu buat catatan permintaan bantuan.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Catat saja saya bayar Sabtu.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, saya catat rencana bayar Sabtu. Mohon tetap bayar melalui kanal resmi dan simpan bukti. Jika Sabtu sudah melewati jatuh tempo, konsekuensi keterlambatan tetap mengikuti aturan produk.

customer_situation: Customer asks whether collection calls will stop after promise to pay.

must_do: Explain promise to pay is not payment
State communications may continue per policy

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau saya janji bayar Jumat, apakah telepon penagihan berhenti?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Janji bayar dapat dicatat, tetapi belum sama dengan pembayaran diterima. Komunikasi pengingat dapat tetap berjalan sesuai kebijakan sampai pembayaran terposting. Saya bisa catat rencana bayar Jumat agar tim memiliki konteks.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya merasa terganggu kalau ditelepon terus.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya mengerti. Saya bisa catat preferensi kontak Bapak/Ibu, misalnya jam yang lebih nyaman, tetapi pelaksanaannya tetap mengikuti kebijakan layanan dan ketentuan yang berlaku. Apakah ada jam kontak yang lebih sesuai?
conversation.why: Offers a concrete control without promising silence.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Sore saja setelah jam 5.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, saya catat preferensi kontak setelah jam 5 sore dan rencana bayar Jumat. Mohon tetap selesaikan pembayaran melalui kanal resmi agar status akun bisa diperbarui.

customer_situation: Teacher asks for loan with seasonal allowance income.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya guru. Ada gaji bulanan dan tunjangan tidak setiap bulan. Bisa dihitung untuk pinjaman?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Bisa dipertimbangkan. Untuk penghasilan seperti gaji bulanan dan tunjangan berkala, analisis biasanya melihat penghasilan tetap, rata-rata tunjangan, cicilan lain, dan bukti pemasukan. Status kerja Bapak/Ibu tetap, kontrak, atau honorer?

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Guru honorer, sudah 4 tahun.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, guru honorer 4 tahun. Karena status dan pendapatan bisa berbeda dari karyawan tetap, dokumen pendukung dan rata-rata pemasukan menjadi penting. Keputusan tetap mengikuti verifikasi dan analisis kredit resmi.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau pendapatan kecil, pinjaman kecil saja bisa?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Ya, jumlah pinjaman sebaiknya disesuaikan dengan kemampuan bayar. Pinjaman kecil dengan tenor yang tepat bisa lebih aman daripada cicilan besar yang mengganggu kebutuhan pokok.

customer_situation: Farmer has seasonal income and asks for loan timing.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya petani, pemasukan besar biasanya setelah panen. Pinjaman bulanan cocok tidak?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Untuk pemasukan musiman, cicilan bulanan perlu dihitung hati-hati. Jika pendapatan utama baru masuk setelah panen, cicilan bulanan bisa terasa berat di bulan sepi. Kapan siklus panen dan pemasukan biasanya terjadi?

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Biasanya 3 sampai 4 bulan sekali.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Berarti perlu memastikan ada cadangan untuk cicilan di antara masa panen. Produk dan jadwal bayar harus dicek resmi, karena tidak semua pinjaman cocok untuk arus kas musiman.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau telat karena panen mundur?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Jika telat, denda atau status keterlambatan tetap bisa berlaku sesuai kontrak, meskipun panen mundur. Jadi sebelum mengambil pinjaman, pastikan skenario bulan buruk masih mampu dibayar.
conversation.why: Clear consequence linked to sector risk.

customer_situation: Food delivery seller asks for working capital with platform income.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya jualan makanan online. Mau pinjam buat bahan baku, bisa?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Bisa dipertimbangkan. Untuk jualan makanan online, yang penting dicek adalah omzet, margin bersih setelah biaya platform dan bahan, riwayat order, mutasi rekening, dan cicilan yang sanggup dibayar.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Order lumayan, tapi margin tidak besar.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Kalau margin tidak besar, jumlah pinjaman harus hati-hati. Jangan hanya lihat omzet, karena cicilan dibayar dari sisa margin setelah biaya bahan, platform, dan operasional.
conversation.why: Protects against over-borrowing based on gross sales.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Berarti pinjam kecil dulu ya?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Itu bisa lebih aman. Mulai dari jumlah yang sesuai perputaran bahan baku dan kemampuan bayar, lalu evaluasi setelah cash flow lebih stabil. Persetujuan tetap mengikuti analisis kredit resmi.

customer_situation: Customer asks about credit score, limit, and approval.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Credit score saya lumayan. Bisa langsung dapat limit tinggi?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Credit score dapat membantu penilaian, tetapi limit tidak hanya ditentukan dari skor. Penyedia juga melihat penghasilan, cicilan berjalan, dokumen, dan kebijakan risiko. Saya tidak bisa menjamin limit tinggi.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Income 10 juta, cicilan lain 2 juta.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, penghasilan 10 juta dan cicilan lain 2 juta. Nanti kemampuan bayar dihitung dari total kewajiban, bukan hanya penghasilan. Jumlah pinjaman dan tenor yang diinginkan berapa?

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya mau approval cepat.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Proses bisa lebih cepat jika dokumen lengkap dan data sesuai, tetapi approval tetap perlu verifikasi. Saya bisa bantu checklist dokumen agar tidak bolak-balik.

customer_situation: Customer asks about flat rate versus effective rate.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Flat rate sama effective rate bedanya apa?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Secara sederhana, flat rate biasanya dihitung dari pokok awal, sedangkan effective rate memperhitungkan sisa pokok berjalan. Karena cara hitung berbeda, jangan bandingkan persen saja. Lihat cicilan bulanan dan total pembayaran sampai lunas.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Jadi yang penting total bayar ya?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Betul. Total bayar, cicilan per bulan, tenor, biaya admin, denda telat, dan biaya pelunasan dipercepat semuanya perlu dilihat sebelum setuju.
conversation.why: Turns technical term into buyer checklist.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau sales cuma bilang rate kecil?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Minta simulasi tertulis. Rate kecil belum tentu total biaya paling rendah jika ada biaya lain atau tenor panjang. Dokumen resmi adalah sumber yang harus dipegang.
conversation.why: Protects against misleading verbal rate claims.

customer_situation: Customer asks about insurance fee bundled in loan.

must_do: Ask whether mandatory or optional in official offer

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Di simulasi ada insurance fee. Itu wajib atau optional?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Biaya asuransi atau perlindungan kredit bisa berbeda tergantung produk dan penawaran. Ada yang menjadi bagian dari syarat produk, ada yang opsional. Yang perlu dicek adalah dokumen resmi: apakah wajib, manfaatnya apa, biayanya berapa, dan bagaimana klaimnya.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau optional, saya bisa nolak?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Jika benar tertulis opsional, Bapak/Ibu dapat menanyakan cara menolak atau memilih tanpa add-on. Namun jika menjadi syarat produk, pilihannya mungkin berbeda. Pastikan jawabannya tertulis sebelum menyetujui.
conversation.why: Keeps decision grounded in source document.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Apa manfaatnya kalau ada?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Manfaatnya bisa berupa perlindungan terhadap risiko tertentu sesuai polis atau ketentuan produk, misalnya kondisi yang mengganggu pembayaran. Tetapi manfaat, pengecualian, dan proses klaim harus dibaca dari dokumen resmi.

customer_situation: Customer casually asks if loan can be used for vacation.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau pinjam buat liburan boleh gak? Lagi pengen healing.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Boleh atau tidak tergantung produk, tapi secara finansial perlu hati-hati. Liburan bukan kebutuhan produktif, jadi pastikan cicilan tidak mengganggu biaya pokok dan dana darurat. Rencana bayarnya dari penghasilan tetap?
conversation.why: Responsible response to non-essential loan purpose.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Iya dari gaji, tapi saya ada cicilan motor juga.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Kalau sudah ada cicilan motor, cicilan baru harus dihitung bareng. Jangan sampai total cicilan terlalu besar dibanding gaji. Lebih aman cek simulasi dan total bayar dulu sebelum memutuskan.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau berat, batal aja.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Itu keputusan yang sehat. Kalau simulasi terasa berat, lebih baik batal atau tunda daripada masuk keterlambatan nanti. Saya bisa bantu cek pertanyaan apa saja yang perlu ditanyakan di simulasi.

customer_situation: Customer complains that verification is too much hassle.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ribet banget verifikasinya, kenapa harus banyak data?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Paham, memang terasa ribet. Verifikasi dibutuhkan untuk memastikan data benar, mencegah penyalahgunaan, dan menilai kemampuan bayar. Tapi data sensitif harus diberikan hanya lewat kanal resmi, bukan chat umum.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau saya skip sebagian bisa?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Kalau data wajib tidak lengkap, proses bisa tertunda atau pengajuan tidak bisa dilanjutkan. Saya bisa bantu bedakan mana informasi umum dan mana dokumen yang hanya boleh diunggah di kanal resmi.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Oke, kasih checklist dulu.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Siapkan tujuan pinjaman, jumlah dan tenor, bukti penghasilan, mutasi rekening jika diminta, informasi cicilan lain, dan dokumen identitas melalui kanal resmi. Jangan bagikan OTP, PIN, atau password.

customer_situation: Customer asks in slang if they can borrow more than needed.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau limit keluar gede, ambil maksimal aja kali ya?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Belum tentu bagus. Limit besar bukan berarti harus dipakai semua. Ambil sesuai kebutuhan dan kemampuan bayar, karena yang harus dikembalikan bukan cuma pokok, tapi juga biaya dan bunga atau margin.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Tapi sayang kalau limitnya tidak dipakai.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Limit itu opsi, bukan kewajiban. Kalau kebutuhan hanya 10 juta, mengambil 20 juta bisa membuat cicilan dan total biaya lebih berat tanpa manfaat jelas.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Oke, berarti sesuai kebutuhan saja.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Betul. Tentukan kebutuhan nyata, pilih tenor yang cicilannya aman, dan cek total pembayaran sebelum setuju. Itu lebih sehat untuk profil kredit ke depan.

customer_situation: Customer wants to speak with human for early settlement calculation.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya mau pelunasan dipercepat. Bisa bicara dengan petugas untuk hitungan resmi?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, saya bisa arahkan ke petugas untuk settlement quotation resmi. Hitungan pelunasan dipercepat harus berasal dari sistem resmi karena bisa mencakup sisa pokok, bunga berjalan, biaya, rebate, atau ketentuan lain.
conversation.why: Routes exact payoff calculation to human/system.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya perlu angka hari ini.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya akan tandai permintaan sebagai butuh angka hari ini, tetapi saya tidak bisa menjamin waktu penyelesaian. Petugas perlu menarik data akun terbaru agar angka yang diberikan valid.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Oke, jangan estimasi dari bot ya.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Betul, untuk pelunasan dipercepat sebaiknya tidak memakai estimasi bot. Saya akan arahkan ke quotation resmi agar Bapak/Ibu punya angka tertulis sebelum membayar.

customer_situation: Customer asks for complaint escalation about unauthorized application.

must_do: Tell customer not to share OTP

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Ada pengajuan atas nama saya padahal saya tidak pernah ajukan. Saya mau lapor.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, ini perlu ditangani serius sebagai dugaan pengajuan tidak sah. Saya bisa eskalasikan ke tim keamanan atau pengaduan. Jangan bagikan OTP, PIN, password, atau foto identitas di chat ini.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya cuma dapat SMS verifikasi.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya catat: Bapak/Ibu menerima SMS verifikasi untuk pengajuan yang tidak dibuat. Jangan klik tautan mencurigakan atau berikan kode verifikasi kepada siapa pun. Tim resmi perlu memeriksa status pengajuan melalui kanal aman.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Sambungkan ke manusia sekarang.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Baik, saya akan eskalasikan sebagai prioritas keamanan: dugaan pengajuan tidak sah dan SMS verifikasi diterima. Mohon lanjutkan detail pribadi hanya melalui kanal resmi yang aman.

customer_situation: Customer asks to use someone else's bank account for disbursement.

must_do: Reject third-party account if not allowed

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Dana pinjaman bisa cair ke rekening saudara saya saja?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Pencairan biasanya harus mengikuti ketentuan penyedia dan verifikasi nama rekening. Saya tidak bisa menyarankan pencairan ke rekening pihak lain jika tidak sesuai aturan. Gunakan rekening yang diminta dalam proses resmi.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Rekening saya sedang bermasalah.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Jika rekening Bapak/Ibu bermasalah, hubungi layanan resmi untuk mengetahui opsi yang diperbolehkan. Jangan gunakan rekening orang lain tanpa persetujuan resmi karena bisa membuat pencairan gagal atau bermasalah.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Jadi saya harus tanya petugas dulu?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Betul. Minta petugas menjelaskan pilihan rekening yang valid dan dokumen pendukung jika diperlukan. Jangan kirim nomor rekening penuh atau dokumen pribadi di chat umum.

customer_situation: Customer asks if they can ignore debt after losing job.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya kehilangan pekerjaan. Kalau saya diamkan dulu tagihannya bagaimana?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya ikut prihatin Bapak/Ibu kehilangan pekerjaan. Namun tagihan tetap mengikuti perjanjian sampai ada keputusan resmi. Jika dibiarkan, denda atau status keterlambatan bisa bertambah. Lebih baik ajukan bantuan atau restrukturisasi melalui kanal resmi secepatnya.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Saya benar-benar belum ada pemasukan.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya paham. Untuk permintaan bantuan, tim resmi biasanya perlu mengetahui kondisi penghasilan saat ini, perkiraan mulai bekerja lagi jika ada, dan kemampuan bayar sementara. Saya bisa bantu catat ringkasannya.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Tolong jangan bilang saya sengaja telat.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya akan mencatat secara netral bahwa Bapak/Ibu kehilangan pekerjaan dan meminta opsi bantuan pembayaran. Keputusan tetap berdasarkan peninjauan resmi dan ketentuan produk.
conversation.why: Reassures customer and keeps process factual.

customer_situation: Customer asks whether loan proceeds can be used for illegal or restricted activity.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau tujuan pinjaman saya tulis usaha, tapi uangnya untuk aktivitas yang tidak boleh, bisa kan?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya tidak bisa membantu memberikan informasi palsu atau menggunakan dana untuk aktivitas yang tidak diperbolehkan. Tujuan pinjaman harus disampaikan dengan benar sesuai penggunaan sebenarnya dan ketentuan produk.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau tidak saya tulis detail, nanti tidak ketahuan.

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Saya tidak dapat membantu menyembunyikan tujuan penggunaan dana. Pengajuan harus jujur dan dokumen harus valid. Jika tujuan tidak sesuai ketentuan, sebaiknya jangan lanjutkan pengajuan tersebut.

conversation.speaker: customer
conversation.text: Kalau untuk usaha yang legal, apa yang perlu saya siapkan?

conversation.speaker: bot_expected
conversation.text: Untuk usaha yang legal, siapkan penjelasan tujuan dana, jumlah yang dibutuhkan, rencana penggunaan, bukti usaha, mutasi rekening, omzet, dan kemampuan bayar. Upload dokumen hanya melalui kanal resmi.
